In rerun::external::re_renderer::external::bytemuck::__core

rerun::external::re_renderer::external::bytemuck::__core

Module isize

1.6.0 · Source
👎Deprecating in a future version: all constants in this module replaced by associated constants on isize
Expand description

Redundant constants module for the isize primitive type.

New code should use the associated constants directly on the primitive type.

Constants§

  • MAXDeprecation planned
    The largest value that can be represented by this integer type. Use isize::MAX instead.
  • MINDeprecation planned
    The smallest value that can be represented by this integer type. Use isize::MIN instead.
